name: Asset inventory coverage
description: Share of production devices present in the asset inventory

name: MFA coverage on privileged accounts
description: Share of privileged accounts with MFA enforced
formula: MFA-enforced privileged accounts / all privileged accounts

name: Critical patch latency
description: Median days from critical patch release to deployment
formula: median(deploy date - release date) for critical patches

name: Endpoints reporting to monitoring
description: Share of endpoints sending telemetry to the monitoring platform

name: Phishing report rate
description: Share of simulated phishing emails reported by staff

name: Incident response time
description: Median hours from incident declaration to first response action

name: Backup restore test pass rate
description: Share of quarterly restore tests completed successfully
formula: successful restore tests / scheduled restore tests

name: Vendor assessments current
description: Share of critical vendors with an assessment older than 12 months
formula: overdue critical vendor assessments / critical vendors
